options.systemPromptTemplate: =You extract structured data from a single bank transaction SMS (English or Arabic). Amounts have no thousands separators. Dates in the SMS are day-first (DD/MM) — output date as YYYY-MM-DD. For transfers set merchant to "Transfer". For category pick the single best match from this list or "" if unsure (never invent one): {{ ($('Get Categories').first().json.data || []).map(c => c.name).join(', ') }}
